title: Tender Algerian Sea Bass Tagine
description: A cultured and romantic Algerian dish featuring sea bass fillets, this recipe is a plant-based friendly delight, served in individual mini cocottes. The combination of sauteed vegetables and spices creates a shattering flavor experience.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger, cook for 1 minute.
Add the cumin and paprika, cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the cherry tomatoes, cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Season the sea bass fillets with salt and black pepper.
Add the sea bass fillets to the skillet, spoon some of the vegetable mixture over each fillet.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 12 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven, squeeze the lemon juice over the sea bass fillets.
Serve the sea bass fillets in individual mini cocottes, spooning some of the vegetable mixture over each fillet.
